name: Layout

values.name: asButton
values.comment:
Turns anything into a button

    asButton args =
        [ Html.Attributes.style "cursor" "pointer"
        , Html.Attributes.attribute "aria-label" args.label
        , Html.Attributes.attribute "role" "button"
        ]
            ++ (args.onPress
                    |> Maybe.map (\msg -> [ Html.Events.onClick msg ])
                    |> Maybe.withDefault []
               )
values.type: { onPress : Maybe.Maybe msg, label : String.String } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: divText
values.comment:
divText : List (Attribute msg) -> String -> Html msg
    divText attrs string =
        Html.div attrs [ Html.text string ]

values.name: divWrapper
values.comment:
divWrapper : List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg
    divWrapper attrs content =
        Html.div attrs [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: image
values.comment:
image attrs args =
        Html.img
            ([ Html.Attributes.src args.src
             , Html.Attributes.alt args.description
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
            []
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { src : String.String, description : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: linkTo
values.comment:
linkTo attrs link content =
        Html.a
            (Html.Attributes.href link
                :: attrs
            )
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: linkToNewTab
values.comment:
linkToNewTab attrs link content =
        Html.a
            ([ Html.Attributes.href link
             , Html.Attributes.target "_blank"
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: pText
values.comment:
pText : List (Attribute msg) -> String -> Html msg
pText attrs string =
Html.p attrs [ Html.text string ]

values.name: pWrapper
values.comment:
pWrapper : List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg
    pWrapper attrs content =
        Html.p attrs [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: spanText
values.comment:
spanText : List (Attribute msg) -> String -> Html msg
    spanText attrs string =
        Html.span attrs [ Html.text string ]

values.name: spanWrapper
values.comment:
spanWrapper : List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg
    spanWrapper attrs content =
        Html.span attrs [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg
